HERO.TITLE: Let's Revolutionize Real Estate in Cameroon
HERO.SUBTITLE: Help us create Africa's leading platform for intelligent real estate management and rental with immersive 360° tours

VISION.VISION_TEXT: Become Africa's leading platform for intelligent real estate management and rental, connecting property owners and tenants through an immersive, transparent and inclusive digital experience.
VISION.MISSION_TEXT: Simplify and digitize rental management by offering a comprehensive platform that allows searching, exploring, renting and managing real estate with confidence.
VISION.IMPACT_TEXT: Transform the lives of thousands of African families by making access to housing simpler, more transparent and equitable through technological innovation.

FEATURES.VR_TOURS_DESC: Facilitate access to housing through revolutionary virtual tours
FEATURES.MOBILE_PAYMENTS_DESC: Secure transactions via Orange Money and MTN Mobile Money
FEATURES.ANALYTICS_DESC: Support property owners with automated financial analysis
FEATURES.ECOSYSTEM_DESC: Create a transparent and equitable environment for all

PRODUCT.TITLE: Discover Ndewa360 in Action
PRODUCT.SUBTITLE: Discover how Ndewa360 revolutionizes real estate management with cutting-edge technologies and a user-centered approach

FEATURES.SMART_SEARCH_DESC: Intelligent search engine with advanced filters (city, type, price, availability) and precise geolocation.
FEATURES.DASHBOARD_DESC: Complete dashboard with monthly revenue, occupancy rates and real-time status of each tenant.
FEATURES.FINANCIAL_MANAGEMENT_DESC: Automatic payment tracking, covered months calculation, automatic reminders and dynamic statistics.
FEATURES.DIGITAL_CONTRACTS_DESC: Automatic generation of rental contracts with electronic signature and centralized management.
FEATURES.AUTOMATED_BILLING_DESC: Automatic billing, email/WhatsApp sending and synchronization with mobile payments.
FEATURES.DIRECT_CONTACT_DESC: Secure communication between tenants and property owners with integrated verification system.

ADVANTAGES.TITLE: Why Ndewa360?
ADVANTAGES.SUBTITLE: The first African platform integrating 360° tours, mobile payments and automated management

FEATURES.IMMERSIVE_TOURS_DESC: First African platform with complete visual exploration of accommodations
FEATURES.INTEGRATED_PAYMENTS_DESC: Direct connection with Orange Money and MTN Mobile Money
FEATURES.COMPLETE_AUTOMATION_DESC: Automated management of contracts, invoices and reminders
FEATURES.AFRICAN_CONTEXT_DESC: Designed for students, young professionals and small landlords

SEGMENTS.INDIVIDUAL_OWNERS_DESC: Individuals with one or more properties
